name: Fudge Krispies
recipeInstructions:
1. COMBINE CHOCOLATE, MARGARINE AND CORN SYRUP IN A MEDIUM SAUCEPAN WITH SILVER- STONE. STIR OVER LOW HEAT UNTIL MELTED AND SMOOTH.
2. REMOVE FROM HEAT. STIR IN VANILLA EXTRACT AND SUGAR.
3. ADD RICE KRISPIES MIXING LIGHTLY UNTIL COATED.
4. SPREAD EVENLY IN A 13X9 X2 PAN.
5. CHILL UNTIL FIRM.
6. CUT INTO 1 1/2 INCH SQUARES.
7. STORE IN REFRIGERATOR. MAKES 48 SQUARES.
